description: Sample tasks for context-pack evaluation. Each task has a description, expected signals, and optional expected files.

tasks.description: Add a new CLI command to the memory subsystem
tasks.notes: Should surface commands.py, cli.py, and related memory module files

tasks.description: Fix a bug in the Tree-sitter parser for Python files
tasks.notes: Should surface parser.py strongly; test_parser.py as a related test

tasks.description: Update the graph store to add a new edge type for inheritance
tasks.notes: Should surface graph.py; tests/test_graph.py as related test

tasks.description: Add a new MCP tool to expose freshness metadata
Improve confidence scoring in the memory classifier
Write integration tests for the incremental update pipeline
tasks.notes: Should surface incremental.py; existing test_incremental.py as the test anchor

tasks.description: Generate a D3.js visualization of the dependency graph
tasks.notes: Should surface visualization.py; test_visualization.py as test

tasks.description: Refactor the context builder to support token budget limits
tasks.notes: Should surface context_builder.py; lookup.py as a related consumer
